Twenty-two percent 'improved employee productivity' main benefit investing platform, believed 'travel cost reduction', 'mobile office' 'saving time resources using presence'.

High costs lengthy integration times, example, often hamper deployment.
then there 'human factors' such having tools track effectiveness individual agents; manage, coach optimise performance; staff effectively enhance customer satisfaction improve business results.
